author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The massive head of Triceratops River Crossing could reach up to 8 feet in length, making up nearly one-third of the animal's total body.
Triceratops River Crossing was a ceratopsian dinosaur characterized by a large bony frill and three horns on its face.
